objective: Set SSO tenant cookie `httpOnly` behavior consistently with normal auth tenant cookie posture.
acceptanceCriteria: SSO tenant cookie uses the same HTTP-only posture as normal auth.
Focused identity tests cover the SSO callback cookie attributes.
rollbackNotes: Preserve unrelated dirty changes; revert only this checkpoint scope if explicitly approved.

outcome: SSO callback tenant cookies now match normal auth cookie posture: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite, Max-Age, and path assertions are covered for OIDC and SAML ACS callbacks, and failed OIDC callbacks emit no cookies.
